name: Banarasi Bridal Silk Saree

description: Elegant Kanjivaram silk saree featuring rich temple borders and luxurious texture. Ideal for traditional ceremonies.

description: Lightweight Chanderi cotton silk saree with delicate woven patterns. Comfortable for daily wear and festive gatherings.

description: Stylish georgette saree designed for evening parties and modern celebrations with elegant drape and soft texture.

name: Designer Chiffon Saree
description: Beautiful chiffon saree with delicate embroidery work and smooth flowing fabric perfect for receptions and parties.

name: Soft Silk Traditional Saree
description: Premium soft silk saree with traditional zari borders and vibrant color ideal for festive occasions.

name: Paithani Wedding Saree
description: Luxurious Paithani silk saree with peacock motifs and rich golden pallu crafted by skilled artisans.

description: Comfortable cotton saree with elegant printed patterns suitable for daily wear and office use.

name: Festive Organza Saree
description: Modern organza silk saree featuring subtle shimmer and elegant embroidery perfect for festive occasions.

name: Designer Net Saree
description: Trendy designer net saree with stylish patterns and elegant blouse combination for modern celebrations.
